verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ طه
verses.text: Ṭā’ Hā’.

verses.quran_arabic: مَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِتَشْقَىٰٓ
verses.text: We have not sent down the Qur’ān on you for you to be miserable,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةًۭ لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: but as a reminder to the one who fears

verses.quran_arabic: تَنزِيلًۭا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ ٱلْعُلَى
verses.text: – as a sending down from the One who created the earth and the high heavens.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ
verses.text: The Merciful is mounted upon the throne.

verses.quran_arabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ
verses.text: To Him (belongs) whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, and whatever is between them, and whatever is beneath the ground.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِٱلْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
verses.text: If you speak the word publicly, surely He knows the secret and (what is even) more hidden.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ
verses.text: God – (there is) no god but Him. To Him (belong) the best names.

verses.quran_arabic: وَهَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ مُوسَىٰٓ
verses.text: Has the story of Moses come to you?

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًۭا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًۭا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًۭى
verses.text: When he saw a fire, he said to his family, ‘Stay (here). Surely I perceive a fire. Perhaps I shall bring you a flaming torch from it, or I shall find at the fire guidance.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِىَ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ
verses.text: But when he came to it, he was called: ‘Moses!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًۭى
verses.text: Surely I am your Lord, so take off your shoes. Surely you are in the holy wādī of Ṭuwā.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنَا ٱخْتَرْتُكَ فَٱسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ
verses.text: I have chosen you, so listen to what is inspired.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ
verses.text: Surely I am God – (there is) no god but Me. So serve Me, and observe the prayer for My remembrance!

competing_variants.variant_arabic: إِنَّنِي أَنَا اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنَا فَاعْبُدْنِي وَأَقِمِ الصَّلَاةَ لِلذِّكْرَى
competing_variants.variant_english: Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for remembrance.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنِي حَرْمَلَةُ بْنُ يَحْيَى التُّجِيبِيُّ، أَخْبَرَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ، أَخْبَرَنِي يُونُسُ، عَنِ ابْنِ شِهَابٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ الْمُسَيَّبِ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ، أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم حِينَ قَفَلَ مِنْ غَزْوَةِ خَيْبَرَ سَارَ لَيْلَهُ حَتَّى إِذَا أَدْرَكَهُ الْكَرَى عَرَّسَ وَقَالَ لِبِلاَلٍ ‏"‏ اكْلأْ لَنَا اللَّيْلَ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ فَصَلَّى بِلاَلٌ مَا قُدِّرَ لَهُ وَنَامَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَأَصْحَابُهُ فَلَمَّا تَقَارَبَ الْفَجْرُ اسْتَنَدَ بِلاَلٌ إِلَى رَاحِلَتِهِ مُوَاجِهَ الْفَجْرِ فَغَلَبَتْ بِلاَلاً عَيْنَاهُ وَهُوَ مُسْتَنِدٌ إِلَى رَاحِلَتِهِ فَلَمْ يَسْتَيْقِظْ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَلاَ بِلاَلٌ وَلاَ أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَصْحَابِهِ حَتَّى ضَرَبَتْهُمُ الشَّمْسُ فَكَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم أَوَّلَهُمُ اسْتِيقَاظًا فَفَزِعَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ ‏"‏ أَىْ بِلاَلُ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ فَقَالَ بِلاَلٌ أَخَذَ بِنَفْسِي الَّذِي أَخَذَ - بِأَبِي أَنْتَ وَأُمِّي يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ - بِنَفْسِكَ قَالَ ‏"‏ اقْتَادُوا ‏"‏ ‏.‏ فَاقْتَادُوا رَوَاحِلَهُمْ شَيْئًا ثُمَّ تَوَضَّأَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم وَأَمَرَ بِلاَلاً فَأَقَامَ الصَّلاَةَ فَصَلَّى بِهِمُ الصُّبْحَ فَلَمَّا قَضَى الصَّلاَةَ قَالَ ‏"‏ مَنْ نَسِيَ الصَّلاَةَ فَلْيُصَلِّهَا إِذَا ذَكَرَهَا فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ قَالَ ‏{‏ أَقِمِ الصَّلاَةَ لِذِكْرِي‏}‏ ‏"‏ ‏.‏ قَالَ يُونُسُ وَكَانَ ابْنُ شِهَابٍ يَقْرَؤُهَا لِلذِّكْرَى ‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Abu Huraira reported that when the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) returned from the expedition to Khaibar, he travelled one night, and stopped for rest when he became sleepy. He told Bilal to remain on guard during the night and he (Bilal) prayed as much as he could, while the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) and his Companions slept. When the time for dawn approached Bilal leaned against his camel facing the direction from which the dawn would appear but he was overcome by sleep while he was leaning against his camel, and neither the Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) nor Bilal, nor anyone else among his Companions got up, till the sun shone on them. Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) was the first of them to awake and, being startled, he called to Bilal who said:Messenger of Allah I may my father and mother be offered as ransom for thee, the same thing overpowered me which overpowered you. He (the Holy Prophet, then) said: Lead the beasts on: so they led their camels to some distance. The Messenger of Allah (ﷺ) then performed ablution and gave orders to Bilal who pronounced the Iqama and then led them in the morning prayer. When he finished the prayer he said: When anyone forgets the prayer, he should observe it when he remembers it, for Allah has said:" And observe the prayer for remembrance of Me" (Qur'an. xx. 14). Yunus said: Ibn Shilab used to recite it like this:" (And observe the prayer) for remembrance"

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: Surely the Hour is coming – I almost hide it, so that every person may be repaid for what he strives after.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ
verses.text: So do not let anyone who does not believe in it, and who (only) follows his (own) desire, keep you from it, or you will be brought to ruin.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَا تِلْكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: ‘What is that in your right (hand), Moses?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘It is my staff. I lean on it, and I bring down leaves with it to (feed) my sheep, and I have other uses for it.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Cast it (down), Moses!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِىَ حَيَّةٌۭ تَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: So he cast it, and suddenly it became a slithering snake.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ ۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Take hold of it, and do not fear. We shall restore it to its former state.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: Now draw your hand to your side. It will come out white, unharmed – another sign.

verses.quran_arabic: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنْ ءَايَٰتِنَا ٱلْكُبْرَى
verses.text: (We have done this) to show you one of Our greatest signs.’

verses.quran_arabic: ٱذْهَبْ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.text: ‘Go to Pharaoh! Surely he has transgressed insolently.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱشْرَحْ لِى صَدْرِى
verses.text: He said, ‘My Lord, expand my heart for me,

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَسِّرْ لِىٓ أَمْرِى
verses.text: and make my task easy for me.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱحْلُلْ عُقْدَةًۭ مِّن لِّسَانِى
verses.text: Untie the knot from my tongue,

verses.quran_arabic: يَفْقَهُوا۟ قَوْلِى
verses.text: so that they may understand my words.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى وَزِيرًۭا مِّنْ أَهْلِى
verses.text: And appoint an assistant for me from my family:

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰرُونَ أَخِى
verses.text: Aaron, my brother.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱشْدُدْ بِهِۦٓ أَزْرِى
verses.text: Strengthen me through him,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَشْرِكْهُ فِىٓ أَمْرِى
verses.text: and associate him in my task,

verses.quran_arabic: كَىْ نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيرًۭا
verses.text: so that we may glorify You often,

verses.quran_arabic: وَنَذْكُرَكَ كَثِيرًا
verses.text: and remember You often.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًۭا
verses.text: Surely you see us.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘You are granted your request, Moses.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰٓ
verses.text: ‘Certainly We bestowed favor on you another time,

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ
verses.text: when We inspired your mother (with) what was inspired:

verses.quran_arabic: أَنِ ٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلتَّابُوتِ فَٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ فَلْيُلْقِهِ ٱلْيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ يَأْخُذْهُ عَدُوٌّۭ لِّى وَعَدُوٌّۭ لَّهُۥ ۚ وَأَلْقَيْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَحَبَّةًۭ مِّنِّى وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِىٓ
verses.text: “Cast him into the ark, and cast it into the sea, and let the sea throw it up on the shore, and an enemy to Me and an enemy to him will take him.” But I cast love on you from Me, and (I did this) so that you might be brought up under My eye.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ تَمْشِىٓ أُخْتُكَ فَتَقُولُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن يَكْفُلُهُۥ ۖ فَرَجَعْنَٰكَ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ كَىْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ ۚ وَقَتَلْتَ نَفْسًۭا فَنَجَّيْنَٰكَ مِنَ ٱلْغَمِّ وَفَتَنَّٰكَ فُتُونًۭا ۚ فَلَبِثْتَ سِنِينَ فِىٓ أَهْلِ مَدْيَنَ ثُمَّ جِئْتَ عَلَىٰ قَدَرٍۢ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: When your sister went out, she said, “Shall I direct you to (someone) who will take charge of him?” And We returned you to your mother, so that she might be comforted and not sorrow. And (then) you killed a man, and We rescued you from that distress, and We tested you thoroughly. So you remained for (some) years with the people of Midian, (and) then you came (here), according to a decree, Moses.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِى
verses.text: ‘I have brought you up for Myself.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايَٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى
verses.text: Go, you and your brother, with My signs, and do not be lax in My remembrance.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱذْهَبَآ إِلَىٰ فِرْعَوْنَ إِنَّهُۥ طَغَىٰ
verses.text: Go, both of you, to Pharaoh. Surely he has transgressed insolently.

verses.quran_arabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًۭا لَّيِّنًۭا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: But speak to him a soft word. Perhaps he may take heed or fear.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَآ إِنَّنَا نَخَافُ أَن يَفْرُطَ عَلَيْنَآ أَوْ أَن يَطْغَىٰ
verses.text: They said, ‘Our Lord, surely we are afraid that he may act rashly against us, or that he may transgress insolently.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ ۖ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Do not be afraid! Surely I am with both of you. I hear and I see.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأْتِيَاهُ فَقُولَآ إِنَّا رَسُولَا رَبِّكَ فَأَرْسِلْ مَعَنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَلَا تُعَذِّبْهُمْ ۖ قَدْ جِئْنَٰكَ بِـَٔايَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۖ وَٱلسَّلَٰمُ عَلَىٰ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
verses.text: So go to him, both of you, and say: “We are two messengers of your Lord, so send forth the Sons of Israel with us, and do not punish them. We have brought you a sign from your Lord. Peace (be) upon anyone who follows the guidance!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا قَدْ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْنَآ أَنَّ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
verses.text: Surely we have been inspired that the punishment (will fall) on anyone who calls (it) a lie and turns away.”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَمَن رَّبُّكُمَا يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘And who is your Lord, Moses?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلْقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Our Lord is the One who gave everything its creation, (and) then guided (it).’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَمَا بَالُ ٱلْقُرُونِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘What (about the) case of the former generations?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّى فِى كِتَٰبٍۢ ۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّى وَلَا يَنسَى
verses.text: He said, ‘The knowledge of it is with my Lord in a Book. My Lord does not go astray, nor does He forget.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًۭا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًۭا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًۭا مِّن نَّبَاتٍۢ شَتَّىٰ
verses.text: (It is He) who made the earth as a cradle for you, and put (path)ways in it for you, and sent down water from the sky. And by means of it We brought forth pairs of various (kinds of) vegetation.

canonical_variants.arabic: اَ۬لَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتّۭيٰ
اَ۬لَّذِي  جَعَل لَّكُمُ اُ۬لۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمۡ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ  اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتّۭيٰ
ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمُۥ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتَّىٰ
ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ مِهَٰدٗا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمُۥ فِيهَا سُبُلٗا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗ فَأَخۡرَجۡنَا بِهِۦ أَزۡوَٰجٗا مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتَّىٰ
اَ۬لذِے جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لْأَرْضَ مِهَٰداٗ وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلاٗ وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗۖ فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦ أَزْوَٰجاٗ مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتَّىٰۖ
اَ۬لذِے جَعَلَ لَكُمُ اُ۬لَارْضَ مِهَٰداٗ وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلاٗ وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مَآءٗۖ فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجاٗ مِّن نَّبَاتٖ شَتّ۪ىٰۖ

verses.quran_arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعَٰمَكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
verses.text: Eat (of it) and pasture your livestock (on it). Surely in that are signs indeed for those with reason.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ مِنْهَا خَلَقْنَٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ
verses.text: We created you from it, and into it We shall return you, and from it We shall bring you forth another time.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرَيْنَٰهُ ءَايَٰتِنَا كُلَّهَا فَكَذَّبَ وَأَبَىٰ
verses.text: Certainly We showed him Our signs, all of them, but he called (them) a lie and refused.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Have you come to bring us forth from our land by your magic, Moses?

verses.quran_arabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍۢ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًۭا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًۭا سُوًۭى
verses.text: We shall indeed bring you magic like it. So set an appointment between us and you – We shall not break it, nor will you – at a fair place.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ مَوْعِدُكُمْ يَوْمُ ٱلزِّينَةِ وَأَن يُحْشَرَ ٱلنَّاسُ ضُحًۭى
verses.text: He said, ‘Your appointment is on the Day of Splendor. Let the people be gathered at morning light.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ فِرْعَوْنُ فَجَمَعَ كَيْدَهُۥ ثُمَّ أَتَىٰ
verses.text: So Pharaoh turned away, and put together his plot. Then he came (again).

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ لَهُم مُّوسَىٰ وَيْلَكُمْ لَا تَفْتَرُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًۭا فَيُسْحِتَكُم بِعَذَابٍۢ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ
verses.text: Moses said to them, ‘Woe to you! Do not forge a lie against God, or He will destroy you with a punishment. Whoever forges (a lie) has failed.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَنَٰزَعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَهُم بَيْنَهُمْ وَأَسَرُّوا۟ ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ
verses.text: So they disputed their situation among themselves, but they kept their talk secret.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ
verses.text: They said, ‘Surely these two magicians want to expel you from your land by their magic, and to do away with your exemplary way (of life).

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَٰذَۦۡنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ اُ۬لۡمُثۡلۭيٰ
canonical_variants.english: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ إِنَّ هَٰذَۦۡنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم  مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ اُ۬لۡمُثۡلۭيٰ
canonical_variants.english: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلۡمُثۡلَىٰ
canonical_variants.english: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُوٓاْ إِنۡ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخۡرِجَاكُم مِّنۡ أَرۡضِكُم بِسِحۡرِهِمَا وَيَذۡهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلۡمُثۡلَىٰ
canonical_variants.english: They said, “These two are nothing but sorcerers

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ إِنَّ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَٰنِ أَنْ يُّخْرِجَٰكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ اُ۬لْمُثْلَىٰۖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُوٓاْ إِنَّ هَٰذَٰنِ لَسَٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَٰنِ أَنْ يُّخْرِجَٰكُم مِّنَ اَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ اُ۬لْمُثْل۪ىٰۖ
canonical_variants.english: They said, ‘Most surely, these two are sorcerers…’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّۭا ۚ وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: So put together your plot, (and) then line up. He who has the upper hand today will indeed prosper.’

canonical_variants.arabic: فَاَجۡمَعُواْ كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ اَ۪ئۡتُواْ صَفّٗاۚ وَقَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ اَ۬لۡيَوۡمَ مَنِ اِ۪سۡتَعۡلۭيٰ
فَاَجۡمَعُواْ كَيۡدَكُمۡ ثُمَّ اَ۪يتُواْ صَفّٗاۚ وَقَدۡ أَفۡلَحَ اَ۬لۡيَوۡم مَّنِ اِ۪سۡتَعۡلۭيٰ

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ
verses.text: They said, ‘Moses! Are you going to cast or shall we be first to cast?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا۟ ۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘No! You cast (first)!’ And suddenly their ropes and their staffs seemed to him to be moving as a result of their magic.

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ فِى نَفْسِهِۦ خِيفَةًۭ مُّوسَىٰ
verses.text: So Moses felt fear within himself.

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
verses.text: We said to him, ‘Do not be afraid! Surely you will be the superior one.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سَٰحِرٍۢ ۖ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ
verses.text: Cast (down) what is in your right (hand), and it will swallow up what they have made. What they have done is only a magician’s trick, and the magician does not prosper, (no matter) where he comes.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًۭا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: And the magicians were cast (down) in prostration. They said, ‘We believe in the Lord of Aaron and Moses.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ ءَامَنتُمْ لَهُۥ قَبْلَ أَنْ ءَاذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكَبِيرُكُمُ ٱلَّذِى عَلَّمَكُمُ ٱلسِّحْرَ ۖ فَلَأُقَطِّعَنَّ أَيْدِيَكُمْ وَأَرْجُلَكُم مِّنْ خِلَٰفٍۢ وَلَأُصَلِّبَنَّكُمْ فِى جُذُوعِ ٱلنَّخْلِ وَلَتَعْلَمُنَّ أَيُّنَآ أَشَدُّ عَذَابًۭا وَأَبْقَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Have you believed in him before I gave you permission? Surely he indeed is your master, the (very) one who taught you magic? I shall indeed cut off your hands and your feet on opposite sides, and I shall indeed crucify you on the trunks of date palms, and you will indeed know which of us is harsher in punishment, and more lasting.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلْبَيِّنَٰتِ وَٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنَا ۖ فَٱقْضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍ ۖ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِى هَٰذِهِ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَآ
verses.text: They said, ‘We shall not prefer you over the clear signs which have come to us, nor (over) Him who created us. So decree whatever you are going to decree. You can only decree for this present life.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطَٰيَٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌۭ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
verses.text: Surely we have believed in our Lord, so that He may forgive us our sins and the magic you forced us to (practice). God is better and more lasting.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَأْتِ رَبَّهُۥ مُجْرِمًۭا فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ
verses.text: Surely the one who comes to his Lord as a sinner, surely for him (there is) Gehenna, where he will neither die nor live.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يَأْتِهِۦ مُؤْمِنًۭا قَدْ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجَٰتُ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
verses.text: But whoever comes to Him as a believer, (and) he has done righteous deeds, those – for them (there are) the highest ranks:

verses.quran_arabic: جَنَّٰتُ عَدْنٍۢ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَٰرُ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ
verses.text: Gardens of Eden, through which rivers flow, there to remain. That is the payment for the one who purifies himself.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى فَٱضْرِبْ لَهُمْ طَرِيقًۭا فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ يَبَسًۭا لَّا تَخَٰفُ دَرَكًۭا وَلَا تَخْشَىٰ
verses.text: Certainly We inspired Moses: ‘Journey with My servants, and strike for them a dry passage in the sea, without fear of being overtaken or being afraid.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَتْبَعَهُمْ فِرْعَوْنُ بِجُنُودِهِۦ فَغَشِيَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْيَمِّ مَا غَشِيَهُمْ
verses.text: So Pharaoh followed them with his forces, but (there) covered them of the sea what covered them.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَضَلَّ فِرْعَوْنُ قَوْمَهُۥ وَمَا هَدَىٰ
verses.text: Pharaoh led his people astray and did not guide (them).

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰبَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدْ أَنجَيْنَٰكُم مِّنْ عَدُوِّكُمْ وَوَٰعَدْنَٰكُمْ جَانِبَ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنَ وَنَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْمَنَّ وَٱلسَّلْوَىٰ
verses.text: Sons of Israel! We have rescued you from your enemy, and made a covenant with you at the right side of the mountain, and sent down on you the manna and the quails:

canonical_variants.arabic: يَٰبَنِيٓ إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوَعَدۡنَٰكُمۡ جَانِبَ اَ۬لطُّورِ اِ۬لۡأَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ اُ۬لۡمَنَّ وَاَلسَّلۡوۭيٰ
canonical_variants.english: and have promised you by the right

canonical_variants.arabic: يَٰبَنِي إِسۡرَٰٓءِيلَ قَدۡ أَنجَيۡنَٰكُم مِّنۡ عَدُوِّكُمۡ وَوَعَدۡنَٰكُمۡ  جَانِبَ اَ۬لطُّورِ اِ۬لۡأَيۡمَنَ وَنَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكُمُ اُ۬لۡمَنَّ وَاَلسَّلۡوۭيٰ
canonical_variants.english: and have promised you by the right

verses.quran_arabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبَٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنَٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى ۖ وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ
verses.text: ‘Eat from the good things which We have provided you, but do not transgress insolently in that, or My anger will descend on you. Whoever My anger falls on has perished.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنِّى لَغَفَّارٌۭ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَٰلِحًۭا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.text: Yet surely I am indeed forgiving to whoever turns (in repentance) and believes, and does righteousness, (and) then is (rightly) guided.’

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَمَآ أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يَٰمُوسَىٰ
verses.text: ‘What has made you hurry (ahead) of your people, Moses?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘They are close on my footsteps, but I have hurried (ahead) to you, my Lord, in order that You might be pleased.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
verses.text: He said, ‘Surely We have tempted your people after you (left them), and al-Sāmirī has led them astray.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَرَجَعَ مُوسَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ غَضْبَٰنَ أَسِفًۭا ۚ قَالَ يَٰقَوْمِ أَلَمْ يَعِدْكُمْ رَبُّكُمْ وَعْدًا حَسَنًا ۚ أَفَطَالَ عَلَيْكُمُ ٱلْعَهْدُ أَمْ أَرَدتُّمْ أَن يَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبٌۭ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ فَأَخْلَفْتُم مَّوْعِدِى
verses.text: So Moses returned to his people, angry (and) sorrowful. He said, ‘My people! Did your Lord not promise you a good promise? Did (the time of) the covenant last too long for you, or did you wish that the anger of your Lord would descend on you, and so you broke (your) appointment with me?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَخْلَفْنَا مَوْعِدَكَ بِمَلْكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حُمِّلْنَآ أَوْزَارًۭا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلْقَوْمِ فَقَذَفْنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ
verses.text: They said, ‘We did not break (our) appointment with you by our (own) will, but we were loaded with burdens of the ornaments of the people, and we cast them (down), and so did al-Sāmirī.’

canonical_variants.arabic: قَالُواْ مَآ أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمِلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حَمَلۡنَآ أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى اَ۬لسَّامِرِيُّ
قَالُواْ مَا أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمِلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حَمَلۡنَا  أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ اِ۬لۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى اَ۬لسَّامِرِيُّ
قَالُواْ مَآ أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمَلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حَمَلۡنَآ أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّامِرِيُّ
قَالُواْ مَآ أَخۡلَفۡنَا مَوۡعِدَكَ بِمَلۡكِنَا وَلَٰكِنَّا حُمِّلۡنَآ أَوۡزَارٗا مِّن زِينَةِ ٱلۡقَوۡمِ فَقَذَفۡنَٰهَا فَكَذَٰلِكَ أَلۡقَى ٱلسَّامِرِيُّ
canonical_variants.english: but we were made to carry burdens

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًۭا جَسَدًۭا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌۭ فَقَالُوا۟ هَٰذَآ إِلَٰهُكُمْ وَإِلَٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِىَ
verses.text: Then he brought forth for them a calf, a (mere) image of it (having) a mooing sound, and they said, ‘This is your god, and the god of Moses, though he has forgotten.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًۭا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّۭا وَلَا نَفْعًۭا
verses.text: Did they not see that it did not return a word to them, and had no power to (cause) them harm or benefit?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ قَالَ لَهُمْ هَٰرُونُ مِن قَبْلُ يَٰقَوْمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ فَٱتَّبِعُونِى وَأَطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرِى
verses.text: Certainly Aaron had said to them before, ‘My people! You are only being tempted by it. Surely your Lord is the Merciful, so follow me and obey my command!’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نَّبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَٰكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ
verses.text: They said, ‘We shall continue (to be) devoted to it until Moses returns to us.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَٰهَٰرُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذْ رَأَيْتَهُمْ ضَلُّوٓا۟
verses.text: He said, ‘Aaron! What prevented you, when you saw them going astray,

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِ ۖ أَفَعَصَيْتَ أَمْرِى
verses.text: from following me? Did you disobey my command?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ يَبْنَؤُمَّ لَا تَأْخُذْ بِلِحْيَتِى وَلَا بِرَأْسِىٓ ۖ إِنِّى خَشِيتُ أَن تَقُولَ فَرَّقْتَ بَيْنَ بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ وَلَمْ تَرْقُبْ قَوْلِى
verses.text: He said, ‘Son of my mother! Do not seize (me) by my beard or by my head! Surely I was afraid that you would say, “You have caused a division among the Sons of Israel, and you have not respected my word.”’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكَ يَٰسَٰمِرِىُّ
verses.text: He said, ‘What was this business of yours, al-Sāmirī?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ بَصُرْتُ بِمَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ بِهِۦ فَقَبَضْتُ قَبْضَةًۭ مِّنْ أَثَرِ ٱلرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذْتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتْ لِى نَفْسِى
verses.text: He said, ‘I saw what they did not see, and I took a handful (of dust) from the footprint of the messenger, and I tossed it. In this way my mind contrived (it) for me.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ فَٱذْهَبْ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَ ۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوْعِدًۭا لَّن تُخْلَفَهُۥ ۖ وَٱنظُرْ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِى ظَلْتَ عَلَيْهِ عَاكِفًۭا ۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ نَسْفًا
verses.text: He said, ‘Go! Surely it is yours in this life to say, “Do not touch (me)!” And surely for you (there is) an appointment – you will not break it. Look at your god which you remained devoted to! We shall indeed burn it (and) then scatter it as dust in the sea.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَاَذۡهَب فَّإِنَّ لَكَ فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلِفَهُۥۖ وَاَنظُرۡ إِلَىٰٓ إِلَٰهِكَ اَ۬لَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي اِ۬لۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا

۞ قَالَ  فَاَذۡهَب فَّإِنَّ لَكَ فِي اِ۬لۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُول لَّا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ  مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلِفَهُۥۖ وَاَنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِكَ اَ۬لَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِ  عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي اِ۬لۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا

قَالَ فَٱذۡهَبۡ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلِفَهُۥۖ وَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِۦ عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا

قَالَ فَٱذۡهَبۡ فَإِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلۡحَيَوٰةِ أَن تَقُولَ لَا مِسَاسَۖ وَإِنَّ لَكَ مَوۡعِدٗا لَّن تُخۡلِفَهُۥۖ وَٱنظُرۡ إِلَىٰ إِلَٰهِكَ ٱلَّذِي ظَلۡتَ عَلَيۡهِۦ عَاكِفٗاۖ لَّنُحَرِّقَنَّهُۥ ثُمَّ لَنَنسِفَنَّهُۥ فِي ٱلۡيَمِّ نَسۡفًا

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَآ إِلَٰهُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًۭا
verses.text: Your only god is God – (there is) no god but Him – who comprehends everything in knowledge.’

verses.quran_arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ مَا قَدْ سَبَقَ ۚ وَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَٰكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكْرًۭا
verses.text: In this way We recount to you some of the stories of what has already gone before, and We have given you a reminder from Us.

verses.quran_arabic: مَّنْ أَعْرَضَ عَنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَحْمِلُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ وِزْرًا
verses.text: Whoever turns away from it, surely he will bear a burden on the Day of Resurrection.

verses.quran_arabic: خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهِ ۖ وَسَآءَ لَهُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ حِمْلًۭا
verses.text: [. . .] there to remain, and evil (will be the) load for them on the Day of Resurrection.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ زُرْقًۭا
verses.text: On the Day when there is a blast on the trumpet – and We shall gather the sinners on that Day blue –

canonical_variants.arabic: يَوۡمَ نَنفُخُ فِي اِ۬لصُّورِۚ وَنَحۡشُرُ اُ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ زُرۡقٗا
يَوۡمَ نَنفُخُ  فِي اِ۬لصُّورِۚ وَنَحۡشُرُ اُ۬لۡمُجۡرِمِينَ يَوۡمَئِذٖ زُرۡقٗا

verses.quran_arabic: يَتَخَٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًۭا
verses.text: they will murmur among themselves: ‘You have remained (in the grave) only for ten (days).’

verses.quran_arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًۭا
verses.text: We know what they will say, when the best of them in way (of life) will say, ‘You have remained only for a day.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّى نَسْفًۭا
verses.text: They ask you about the mountains. Say: ‘My Lord will scatter them as dust,

verses.quran_arabic: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًۭا صَفْصَفًۭا
verses.text: and He will leave it a barren plain

verses.quran_arabic: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًۭا وَلَآ أَمْتًۭا
verses.text: in which you will not see any crookedness or curve.’

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ ۖ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمَٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًۭا
verses.text: On that Day they will follow the Caller, in whom (there is) no crookedness, and voices will be hushed before the Merciful, so that you will hear nothing but a faint murmur.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًۭا
verses.text: On that Day intercession will not be of any benefit, except for the one to whom the Merciful gives permission, and whose word He approves.

verses.quran_arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًۭا
verses.text: He knows what is before them and what is behind them, but they do not encompass Him in knowledge.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَعَنَتِ ٱلْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَىِّ ٱلْقَيُّومِ ۖ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًۭا
verses.text: Faces will be humbled before the Living, the Everlasting. Whoever carries (a load of) evildoing will have failed,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤْمِنٌۭ فَلَا يَخَافُ ظُلْمًۭا وَلَا هَضْمًۭا
verses.text: but whoever does any righteous deeds – and he is a believer – he will not fear (any) evil or dispossession.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَلَا يَخَفۡ ظُلۡمٗا وَلَا هَضۡمٗا
canonical_variants.english: then he should neither fear injustice nor curtailment.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَمَن يَعۡمَلۡ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ وَهُوَ مُؤۡمِنٞ فَلَا يَخَفۡ ظُلۡمٗا وَلَا هَضۡمٗا
canonical_variants.english: then he should neither fear injustice nor curtailment.

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ أَنزَلْنَٰهُ قُرْءَانًا عَرَبِيًّۭا وَصَرَّفْنَا فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْوَعِيدِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَّقُونَ أَوْ يُحْدِثُ لَهُمْ ذِكْرًۭا
verses.text: In this way We have sent it down as an Arabic Qur’ān, and We have varied some of the promise(s) in it, so that they may guard (themselves), or so that it may arouse in them a reminder.

verses.quran_arabic: فَتَعَٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۗ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ ۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًۭا
verses.text: Exalted is God, the true King! Do not be in a hurry with the Qur’ān, before its inspiration is completed to you, but say: ‘My Lord, increase me in knowledge.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًۭا
verses.text: Certainly We made a covenant with Adam before, but he forgot, and We found in him no determination.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ
verses.text: (Remember) when We said to the angels, ‘Prostrate yourselves before Adam,’ and they prostrated themselves, except Iblīs. He refused.

verses.quran_arabic: فَقُلْنَا يَٰٓـَٔادَمُ إِنَّ هَٰذَا عَدُوٌّۭ لَّكَ وَلِزَوْجِكَ فَلَا يُخْرِجَنَّكُمَا مِنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ فَتَشْقَىٰٓ
verses.text: And We said, ‘Adam! Surely this is an enemy to you and to your wife. Do not let him expel you both from the Garden, and you become miserable.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ
verses.text: Surely it is yours not to hunger there or go naked,

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ
verses.text: nor to thirst there or be exposed to the sun.’

verses.quran_arabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنُ قَالَ يَٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍۢ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ
verses.text: But Satan whispered to him. He said, ‘Adam! Shall I direct you to the Tree of Immortality, and (to) a kingdom that does not decay?’

verses.quran_arabic: فَأَكَلَا مِنْهَا فَبَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءَٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ ۚ وَعَصَىٰٓ ءَادَمُ رَبَّهُۥ فَغَوَىٰ
verses.text: So they both ate from it, and their shameful parts became apparent to them, and they both began fastening on themselves some leaves of the Garden, and Adam disobeyed his Lord and erred.

verses.quran_arabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْتَبَٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ
verses.text: Then his Lord chose him, and turned to him (in forgiveness), and guided (him).

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا ۖ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّۭ ۖ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًۭى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ
verses.text: He said, ‘Go down from it, both of you together, some of you an enemy to others. If any guidance comes to you from Me, whoever follows My guidance will not go astray, nor become miserable.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَنْ أَعْرَضَ عَن ذِكْرِى فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ مَعِيشَةًۭ ضَنكًۭا وَنَحْشُرُهُۥ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَٰمَةِ أَعْمَىٰ
verses.text: But whoever turns away from My reminder, surely for him (there will be) a life of deprivation, and We shall gather him blind on the Day of Resurrection.’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًۭا
verses.text: He will say, ‘My Lord, why have you gathered me blind, when I had sight before?’

verses.quran_arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ ءَايَٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ
verses.text: He will say, ‘So (it is). Our signs came to you, but you forgot them, so today you are forgotten.’

verses.quran_arabic: وَكَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَنْ أَسْرَفَ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنۢ بِـَٔايَٰتِ رَبِّهِۦ ۚ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلْءَاخِرَةِ أَشَدُّ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ
verses.text: In this way We repay anyone who acts wantonly and does not believe in the signs of his Lord. Yet the punishment of the Hereafter is indeed harsher and more lasting.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَهْدِ لَهُمْ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ يَمْشُونَ فِى مَسَٰكِنِهِمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَءَايَٰتٍۢ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ
verses.text: Is it not a guide for them how many generations We destroyed before them, (seeing that) they walk in (the midst of) their dwelling places? Surely in that are signs indeed for those with reason.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَا كَلِمَةٌۭ سَبَقَتْ مِن رَّبِّكَ لَكَانَ لِزَامًۭا وَأَجَلٌۭ مُّسَمًّۭى
verses.text: Were it not for a preceding word from your Lord, it would indeed be close at hand – but (there is) a time appointed (for punishment).

verses.quran_arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا ۖ وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ
verses.text: So be patient with what they say, and glorify your Lord with praise before the rising of the sun, and before its setting, and during the hours of the night, and glorify (Him) at the ends of the day, so that you may find satisfaction.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ غُرُوبِهَاۖ وَمِنۡ ءَانَآيِٕ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡ وَأَطۡرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تُرۡضَىٰ
canonical_variants.english: that you may be rendered well pleased.

canonical_variants.arabic: فَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ قَبۡلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمۡسِ وَقَبۡلَ غُرُوبِهَاۖ وَمِنۡ ءَانَآيِٕ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡ وَأَطۡرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرۡضَىٰ
canonical_variants.english: that you may be well pleased.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًۭا مِّنْهُمْ زَهْرَةَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَرِزْقُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌۭ وَأَبْقَىٰ
verses.text: Do not yearn after what We have given classes of them to enjoy – the flower of this present life – that We may test them by means of it. The provision of your Lord is better and more lasting.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا ۖ لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًۭا ۖ نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ ۗ وَٱلْعَٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ
verses.text: Command your family (to observe) the prayer, and be patient in it. We do not ask you for provision. We provide for you, and the outcome (is) for the guarding (of yourself).

verses.quran_arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍۢ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ ۚ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ
verses.text: They say, ‘If only he would bring us a sign from his Lord.’ Has there not come to them a clear sign (of) what was in the former pages?

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْ أَنَّآ أَهْلَكْنَٰهُم بِعَذَابٍۢ مِّن قَبْلِهِۦ لَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا لَوْلَآ أَرْسَلْتَ إِلَيْنَا رَسُولًۭا فَنَتَّبِعَ ءَايَٰتِكَ مِن قَبْلِ أَن نَّذِلَّ وَنَخْزَىٰ
verses.text: If We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would indeed have said, ‘Our Lord, if only you had sent us a messenger, so that we might have followed your signs before we were humiliated and disgraced?’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ كُلٌّۭ مُّتَرَبِّصٌۭ فَتَرَبَّصُوا۟ ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَصْحَٰبُ ٱلصِّرَٰطِ ٱلسَّوِىِّ وَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ
verses.text: Say: ‘Each one is waiting, so you wait (too), and then you will know who are the followers of the even path, and who is (rightly) guided.’
